requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage and Frequency — 230/400 V 50 Hz and IEC Alignment
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率——230/400 V 50 Hz及IEC体系
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率——230/400 V 50 Hz及IEC體系

summary.en: Brunei (Negara Brunei Darussalam) operates a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid, supplied by the Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development. This voltage and frequency aligns with IEC standard practice (IEC 60038 nominal voltages). DES is the principal electrical installation authority in Brunei and coordinates approval of grid-connected electrical installations. No dedicated published Brunei EV-charger grid-connection code has been confirmed as of 2026-06; grid-connected EV charger installations are expected to be coordinated with and approved by DES. Exporters must confirm charger input-voltage and frequency ratings cover 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, consistent with IEC 60038.
summary.zh: 文莱（文莱达鲁萨兰国）采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz电网，由发展部电气服务部（DES）供电管理。该电压和频率符合IEC标准（IEC 60038标称电压）。DES是文莱主要电气安装审批机构，负责协调并网电气安装审批。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布针对电动汽车充电桩并网接入的规程；预期并网电动汽车充电桩安装须向DES协调并取得审批。出口商须确认充电桩输入电压和频率额定值覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，符合IEC 60038要求。
summary.zht: 汶萊（汶萊達魯薩蘭國）採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz電網，由發展部電氣服務部（DES）供電管理。該電壓和頻率符合IEC標準（IEC 60038標稱電壓）。DES是汶萊主要電氣安裝審批機構，負責協調併網電氣安裝審批。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布針對電動汽車充電樁併網接入的規程；預期併網電動汽車充電樁安裝須向DES協調並取得審批。出口商須確認充電樁輸入電壓和頻率額定值覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，符合IEC 60038要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60038:2009 — IEC standard voltages (230/400 V 50 Hz nominal)
Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei — electrical installation authority
Brunei Electricity Order (Cap. 165) — framework legislation for electricity supply and installation

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are designed for 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, per GB/T 18487.1-2023 and the national grid standard. The Brunei 230 V / 400 V nominal supply is close to but not identical to the China 220 V / 380 V baseline. Exporters should confirm that the charger's input-voltage tolerance range covers 230 V / 400 V (IEC 60038 nominal), verify transformer or rectifier ratings, and confirm that power electronics and thermal design are rated for Brunei's tropical ambient conditions (27–32°C year-round, high humidity).
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装按照GB/T 18487.1-2023及国家电网标准设计，适用于220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。文莱标称电压230 V / 400 V与中国220 V / 380 V基线接近但不完全相同。出口商应确认充电桩输入电压容差范围覆盖230 V / 400 V（IEC 60038标称值），核实变压器或整流器额定值，并确认电力电子和热设计适用于文莱热带环境条件（全年27-32°C，高湿度）。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝按照GB/T 18487.1-2023及國家電網標準設計，適用於220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。汶萊標稱電壓230 V / 400 V與中國220 V / 380 V基線接近但不完全相同。出口商應確認充電樁輸入電壓容差範圍覆蓋230 V / 400 V（IEC 60038標稱值），核實變壓器或整流器額定值，並確認電力電子和熱設計適用於汶萊熱帶環境條件（全年27-32°C，高濕度）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) charger input-voltage range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) power electronics, thermal design, and enclosure ratings are suitable for Brunei's tropical climate (27–32°C sustained, high relative humidity); (3) no published DES EV-charger grid-connection code has been confirmed as of 2026-06 — DES coordination is required before installation; (4) grid-connected installations should obtain DES approval as for other electrical installations. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design is close to Brunei nominal voltages, making hardware adaptation straightforward, but input-voltage tolerance and thermal ratings must still be explicitly confirmed.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 电力电子、热设计和外壳额定值适用于文莱热带气候（持续27-32°C，高相对湿度）；(3) 截至2026年6月，未发现DES已发布电动汽车充电桩并网规程——安装前须与DES协调；(4) 并网安装应按其他电气安装要求取得DES审批。中国国内220 V / 380 V设计与文莱标称电压接近，硬件适配相对简便，但输入电压容差和热额定值仍须明确确认。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 電力電子、熱設計和外殼額定值適用於汶萊熱帶氣候（持續27-32°C，高相對濕度）；(3) 截至2026年6月，未發現DES已發布電動汽車充電樁併網規程——安裝前須與DES協調；(4) 併網安裝應按其他電氣安裝要求取得DES審批。中國國內220 V / 380 V設計與汶萊標稱電壓接近，硬件適配相對簡便，但輸入電壓容差和熱額定值仍須明確確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DES is the electrical installation authority for Brunei; grid-connected EV charger installations require DES coordination and approval; no confirmed dedicated EV-charger grid-connection code published as of 2026-06
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a DES approval substitute; voltage and thermal ratings must be re-confirmed for Brunei conditions

source.publisher: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Development, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brunei's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid is close to China's 220/380 V baseline, making voltage adaptation relatively straightforward. However, DES coordination for grid-connected installation, tropical climate thermal rating, and humidity-rated enclosure design are all required. No specific DES EV-charger code has been confirmed — coordinate with DES and the local importer before committing to a project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱230/400 V 50 Hz电网与中国220/380 V基线接近，电压适配相对简便。但并网安装仍需DES协调，热带气候热额定值和湿度防护等级设计均为必要条件。目前未发现DES专项电动汽车充电桩规程——在确定项目前须与DES及当地进口商协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊230/400 V 50 Hz電網與中國220/380 V基線接近，電壓適配相對簡便。但併網安裝仍需DES協調，熱帶氣候熱額定值和濕度防護等級設計均為必要條件。目前未發現DES專項電動汽車充電樁規程——在確定項目前須與DES及當地進口商協調。

requirement_topic.en: AC Charging Levels — IEC 61851-1 Mode 2 / Mode 3 vs GB/T 18487.1-2023
requirement_topic.zh: 交流充电等级——IEC 61851-1模式2/模式3与GB/T 18487.1-2023
requirement_topic.zht: 交流充電等級——IEC 61851-1模式2/模式3與GB/T 18487.1-2023

summary.en: Brunei follows IEC 61851-1 for AC EV charging system general requirements, consistent with the broader ASEAN IEC-aligned ecosystem. Mode 2 (portable EVSE with in-cable control box, domestic socket) and Mode 3 (dedicated EVSE with IEC 62196 Type 2 connector) are the applicable AC charging modes. Mode 3 with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connectors is the expected standard for dedicated AC charging points. No confirmed Brunei-specific published charging-level regulation has been found as of 2026-06; however, IEC 61851-1 compliance is the default IEC-aligned expectation for EVSE in Brunei.
summary.zh: 文莱遵循IEC 61851-1交流电动汽车充电系统通用要求，与东盟更广泛的IEC体系生态一致。适用的交流充电模式为模式2（便携式EVSE含线内控制盒，使用家用插座）和模式3（专用EVSE，配IEC 62196 Type 2接口）。专用交流充电点的预期标准为模式3配IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口。截至2026年6月，未发现文莱专门发布充电等级法规；但IEC 61851-1合规性是文莱EVSE的默认IEC体系预期。
summary.zht: 汶萊遵循IEC 61851-1交流電動汽車充電系統通用要求，與東盟更廣泛的IEC體系生態一致。適用的交流充電模式為模式2（便攜式EVSE含線內控制盒，使用家用插座）和模式3（專用EVSE，配IEC 62196 Type 2接口）。專用交流充電點的預期標準為模式3配IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口。截至2026年6月，未發現汶萊專門發布充電等級法規；但IEC 61851-1合規性是汶萊EVSE的默認IEC體系預期。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (Mode 2, Mode 3 definitions)
Department of Electrical Services (DES) — installation authority; no confirmed dedicated EV-charger regulation published as of 2026-06

summary.en: China's AC EV charging system is governed by GB/T 18487.1-2023, which defines charging modes structurally corresponding to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector signaling (CC/CP) and GB/T 20234.2 coupler requirements. China Mode 3 equivalent uses GB/T 20234.2 connectors, which are physically and electrically incompatible with IEC 62196-2 Type 2. A China-standard AC charger with GB/T connectors cannot be directly deployed in an IEC 62196-aligned Brunei installation.
summary.zh: 中国交流电动汽车充电系统由GB/T 18487.1-2023管理，其充电模式在结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口信号（CC/CP）和GB/T 20234.2耦合器要求。中国模式3等效采用GB/T 20234.2接口，该接口与IEC 62196-2 Type 2在物理和电气层面均不兼容。配备GB/T接口的中国标准交流充电桩无法直接用于文莱IEC 62196体系安装。
summary.zht: 中國交流電動汽車充電系統由GB/T 18487.1-2023管理，其充電模式在結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口信號（CC/CP）和GB/T 20234.2耦合器要求。中國模式3等效採用GB/T 20234.2接口，該接口與IEC 62196-2 Type 2在物理和電氣層面均不兼容。配備GB/T接口的中國標準交流充電樁無法直接用於汶萊IEC 62196體系安裝。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
GB/T 20234.2-2015 — AC charging coupler (GB/T standard, incompatible with IEC 62196-2 Type 2)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the AC charger complies with IEC 61851-1 Mode 3 requirements including control pilot (CP) and proximity pilot (PP) signaling per IEC 62196-2; (2) connectors are redesigned from GB/T 20234.2 to IEC 62196-2 Type 2 — these are not interchangeable and cannot be adapted by cable adapter alone; (3) DES installation coordination is required; (4) IEC 61851-1 accredited test evidence replaces GB/T 18487 evidence for Brunei-facing documentation.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 交流充电桩符合IEC 61851-1模式3要求，包括IEC 62196-2规定的控制导引（CP）和接近导引（PP）信号；(2) 接口从GB/T 20234.2改为IEC 62196-2 Type 2——两者不可互换，不能仅通过线缆转接器替代；(3) 须向DES协调安装事宜；(4) 面向文莱的文件须以IEC 61851-1认可测试证据替代GB/T 18487证据。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 交流充電樁符合IEC 61851-1模式3要求，包括IEC 62196-2規定的控制導引（CP）和接近導引（PP）信號；(2) 接口從GB/T 20234.2改為IEC 62196-2 Type 2——兩者不可互換，不能僅通過線纜轉接器替代；(3) 須向DES協調安裝事宜；(4) 面向汶萊的文件須以IEC 61851-1認可測試證據替代GB/T 18487證據。

mandatory_status.target: Expected as IEC-aligned baseline; no confirmed mandatory Brunei EV-charger charging-level regulation published as of 2026-06; DES coordination required for all grid-connected installations
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487.1-2023 applies to China domestic design; it is not an IEC 61851-1 compliance substitute for Brunei-facing installations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brunei follows the IEC 61851-1 charging mode framework. A China GB/T 18487 AC charger with GB/T 20234.2 connectors is not Mode 3 / IEC 62196 Type 2 compatible and requires hardware and signaling redesign before deployment in Brunei. Confirm DES installation requirements with the local importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 文莱遵循IEC 61851-1充电模式框架。配备GB/T 20234.2接口的中国GB/T 18487交流充电桩与模式3 / IEC 62196 Type 2不兼容，在文莱部署前须进行硬件和信号重新设计。发货前应通过当地进口商向DES确认安装要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 汶萊遵循IEC 61851-1充電模式框架。配備GB/T 20234.2接口的中國GB/T 18487交流充電樁與模式3 / IEC 62196 Type 2不兼容，在汶萊部署前須進行硬件和信號重新設計。發貨前應通過當地進口商向DES確認安裝要求。
